name: test_create_user[TC_USR_CREATE_004-data3]
description:
POST /users — parametrized across 5 different user payloads.
        Verifies status 201, all expected fields present,
        echoed name/job, and schema compliance for each case.

        Test cases: TC_USR_CREATE_001 → TC_USR_CREATE_005
descriptionHtml:
POST /users — parametrized across 5 different user payloads.
    Verifies status 201, all expected fields present,
    echoed name/job, and schema compliance for each case.

    Test cases: TC_USR_CREATE_001 → TC_USR_CREATE_005
statusMessage:
AssertionError: [TC_USR_CREATE_004] Create user with minimal single-word values
    Expected 201, got 429. Body: {"error":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"You've hit the free-tier limit of 250 requests/day.","upgrade":{"message":"Lite ($5/mo): 10,000 requests/day with commercial use license. Building a backend? See Dev ($12/mo).","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api&highlight=lite","pricing_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&highlight=lite"},"current_usage":{"requests_today":250,"daily_limit":250,"resets_at":"2026-05-12T00:00:00.000Z"},"limit":250,"remaining":0,"reset_at":1778544000,"resets_in":"14h 19m","reset_explanation":"Limits reset daily at midnight UTC","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade?source=rate_limit&endpoint=legacy_api","recommended_plan":"dev","why_this_happened":"Free tier includes 250 requests/day. Upgrade for higher limits, persistent collections, auth, and logs.","tier":"free","_meta":{"powered_by":"ReqRes","docs_url":"https://app.reqres.in/documentation","upgrade_url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade","example_url":"https://app.reqres.in/examples/notes-app","variant":"v1_b","message":"Too many requests. Back off, or use Projects for higher limits.","cta":{"label":"Get started","url":"https://app.reqres.in/upgrade"},"context":"rate_limited"}}
assert 429 == 201
 +  where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
